span.p:
Apply threshold/cap
discoveredCap = min(discoveryCap, triageMaxUrls)
once triage applies

span.p:
Immediate outputs:
selected_urls trace
candidate trace enrichment
serp_explorer
searchProfileFinal
discovery/candidate payloads

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Return payload:
candidates, approvedUrls,
candidateUrls, search_profile,
serp_explorer, attempts, journal

span.p:
Active score_det terms:
brand/model presence
spec/manual keywords
frontier penalty
identity, guard, tier

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Inner LLM gate:
llmEnabled and
plan-route key?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Dormant on this call path:
host health
operator risk
field affinity
NeedSet coverage
diversity penalty

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
No -> deterministic keep rows
rerank_reason = deterministic

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Yes -> call uber_serp_reranker
merge keep/drop results
fallbacks if empty/error

collectDomainClassificationSeeds()
candidate hosts first
host-plan/brandResolution only if empty

merge query metadata

denied_host
url_cooldown
manufacturer_brand_mismatch
low_relevance

doc_kind_guess, role, tier,
identity_match_level,
variant_guard_hit, multi_model_hint
